message:
🌱 Add grpc: Support pre-built binaries for Ruby 3.1 mission (#1494)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "grpc-28627-support-pre-built-binaries-for-ruby-3-1",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "grpc: Support pre-built binaries for Ruby 3.1",
+    "description": "Support pre-built binaries for Ruby 3.1. Requested by 22+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current grpc setup",
+        "description": "Verify your grpc version:\ngRPC library — check your language-specific package (e.g., pip show grpcio, npm ls @grpc/grpc-js)\nThis feature requires grpc as a dependency."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review grpc configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant grpc configuration:\n### Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.\nIt seems grpc does not support pre-built binaries for Ruby 3.1. This causes the gem-folder to balloon to almost 1gb."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support pre-built binaries for Ruby 3.1",
+        "description": "If you want to save some space (in our case it's like 800MB) you can run the following after installing the gem:\n\n```shell\ngrpc_path=\"$(bundle show --paths grpc)/src/ruby/ext/grpc\"\nmake -C $grpc_path clean\nrm -rf \"$grpc_path\"/{libs,objs}\n```\n```yaml\ngrpc_path=\"$(bundle show --paths grpc)/src/ruby/ext/grpc\"\nmake -C $grpc_path clean\nrm -rf \"$grpc_path\"/{libs,objs}\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"Support pre-built binaries for Ruby 3.1\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "If you want to save some space (in our case it's like 800MB) you can run the following after installing the gem:\n\n```shell\ngrpc_path=\"$(bundle show --paths grpc)/src/ruby/ext/grpc\"\nmake -C $grpc_path clean\nrm -rf \"$grpc_path\"/{libs,objs}\n```",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "grpc_path=\"$(bundle show --paths grpc)/src/ruby/ext/grpc\"\nmake -C $grpc_path clean\nrm -rf \"$grpc_path\"/{libs,objs}"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
